title: mzPeak controlled vocabulary list
description: Describe the JSON format of the controlled vocabulary list, analogous to https://peptideatlas.org/tmp/mzML1.1.0.html#cvList

cv.description: Describe the JSON format of a controlled vocabulary, analogous to https://peptideatlas.org/tmp/mzML1.1.0.html#cv

id.description: The short identifier used for CURIEs from this controlled vocabulary.

version.description: The version for this controlled vocabulary, like a release number, date, or similar. No particular format is expected.

full_name.description: The usual name for the resource (e.g. The PSI-MS Controlled Vocabulary).

uri.description: The URI for the controlled vocabulary.
